sense.definition: a large container usually made of glass that is filled with water in which fish and other sea creatures are kept
a structure designed to provide shelter and confinement for pet birds

examples.x: She placed the parakeet in its bird cage next to the window so it could enjoy the sunlight.
The bird cage was cleaned every week to ensure the bird had a healthy living space.
He bought a bird cage with a removable tray for easy cleaning.
The new bird cage had plenty of space for the canaries to fly around in.
We moved the bird cage outside to let the birds enjoy the fresh air for a few hours.

sense.definition: prepared food intended for consumption by pets, typically dogs and cats, but also including food for other domestic animals such as birds, rabbits, and hamsters

examples.x: The pet food aisle in the store was filled with a variety of brands for different types of animals.
She carefully measured out the pet food for her dog to make sure he got the right amount.
The cat seemed to enjoy the new flavor of pet food she had bought.
The bird's cage was stocked with fresh pet food and clean water.
They decided to switch to organic pet food after reading about its benefits.

sense.definition: a small amount of food or a snack given to an animal as a reward or for training purposes
a piece of equipment that fits around an animal's body, typically a dog or cat, and is used to secure and control the animal

examples.x: The dog tugged excitedly at the leash attached to its colorful harness.
She gently fastened the harness on her cat before taking it for a stroll in the park.
The harness ensures the pet is both secure and comfortable during their walk.
The trainer recommended using a harness for the puppy to prevent strain on its neck.
He adjusted the harness to fit snugly around the dog's chest before heading out.

sense.definition: a type of cage or enclosure designed to safely contain a dog for short periods of time, usually for transportation, training, or as a secure resting place

examples.x: The dog crate is a safe place where my puppy can relax when I am not home.
I use the dog crate during car trips to keep my dog secure and calm.
The vet recommended a dog crate to help with my dog's anxiety during storms.
We bought a larger dog crate as our puppy grew bigger.

sense.definition: a portable enclosure used to transport pets, such as cats, dogs, and other small animals, from one place to another

examples.x: I put my cat in the pet carrier before heading to the vet.
The airline required us to use a pet carrier when flying with our dog.
After buying a new pet carrier, we were ready to take our cat on vacation.
He used the pet carrier to bring his hamster to the pet store for supplies.

sense.definition: a container filled with special litter for cats or other small animals to use as a toilet

examples.x: She filled the litter box with fresh litter to make it more comfortable for her cat.
The litter box is placed in a quiet corner of the room, so the cat can use it in peace.
He noticed that his cat refused to use the litter box after it was moved.
The cat scratched around in the litter box before settling down to use it.

sense.definition: a small, disposable bag used for picking up and disposing of pet waste, typically dog waste, while on walks or in public spaces

examples.x: Always carry a poop bag when you take your dog for a walk.
Make sure to use a poop bag to pick up after your pet in the park.
After the dog finished, I grabbed a poop bag to clean up.
She tied the poop bag tightly before throwing it in the trash.

sense.definition: an absorbent pad that is designed to train puppies or dogs to relieve themselves indoors in a specific area

examples.x: The puppy was still learning, so we placed a training pad in the corner of the room for him to use.
She used a training pad while potty training her new dog to avoid accidents around the house.
We had to replace the training pad every day to keep the area clean and fresh.
After a few weeks of using the training pad, the dog began to understand where to go.
I bought a pack of training pads to help with my dog’s housebreaking process.

sense.definition: a tool designed for cleaning and maintaining a cat's litter box

examples.x: The litter scoop broke, so I had to buy a new one for the litter box.
She used the litter scoop to remove the waste and refill the box with fresh litter.
I keep the litter scoop next to the litter box for easy access.
He quickly grabbed the litter scoop to clean up after his cat.
After using the litter scoop, I throw the waste in a bag and dispose of it properly.

sense.definition: a toy for pets, typically made from compressed rawhide or other materials, that is designed to be chewed on and help keep the animal's teeth clean and healthy

examples.x: The dog loved chewing on its new chew bone while lying on the carpet.
You should buy a chew bone that is appropriate for your dog's size to ensure it's safe.
Make sure to give your puppy a chew bone to help with teething.
I always keep a few chew bones in the cupboard for when my dog needs something to chew on.
The vet recommended giving the dog a chew bone to improve its dental health.

sense.definition: a piece of furniture designed for cats to scratch on as an alternative to scratching on other household items

examples.x: We bought a new scratching post for our kitten to help protect the couch.
The scratching post is covered in rope, which the cat enjoys clawing at.
After we set up the scratching post, the cat stopped scratching the carpet.
I need to replace the scratching post because the one we have is worn out.
The scratching post helps keep the cat's claws trimmed and healthy.

sense.definition: a small handheld device used as a training tool for pets, such as dogs or cats, to reinforce positive behavior by producing a distinct clicking sound when pressed

examples.x: The trainer used a clicker to teach the dog how to sit on command.
He practiced with the clicker to teach his dog new tricks like rolling over and shaking paws.
I brought the clicker with me to the park to train my dog to stay by my side.
Clickers are a great tool for positive reinforcement, especially when training animals.
She clicked the clicker every time the puppy stopped barking, rewarding it with a treat.

sense.definition: a small hole in the bottom of the entrance door that is covered by a piece of often transparent plastic which easily swings to allow pets an easy way into and out of a house

examples.x: I installed a cat door so my cat can go outside whenever she wants.
My cat loves the new cat door because it gives her more freedom to roam.
The cat door allows our kitten to explore the garden without having to open the main door.
We locked the cat door at night to keep the cat inside, but she can still go out during the day.
After installing the cat door, I noticed that the cat spends much more time outdoors.

sense.definition: a device that automatically dispenses food or water to pets on a regular schedule or on demand

examples.x: The pet feeder made it easy to ensure the dog was fed while I was at work.
I filled the automatic pet feeder before leaving for the weekend.
The cat loves using the pet feeder, as it dispenses food at regular intervals.
The pet feeder has multiple compartments, so I can separate dry and wet food.
After setting up the pet feeder, I no longer had to worry about missing feeding times.

sense.definition: a small structure used as a shelter for a dog
a wooden box with a wired front used for keeping small domesticated animals, such as rabbits, ferrets, etc.
a long piece of rope, leather strap or light chain used for guiding and controlling a dog or other animals

examples.x: She held the dog's leash tightly as they walked through the park.
The leash prevented the puppy from running too far ahead.
The trainer attached a leash to the collar before starting obedience training.
Dogs must be kept on a leash in public places for safety.
He forgot to bring a leash and had to carry the small dog in his arms.

sense.definition: a band of leather or rope that is placed around an animal's neck as a harness or to identify it
